title: DecisionRecord
description: Mayor-only output: binary shipping decision with explicit blockers. Immutable once written. RSM v0.1 compliant.

run_id.description: Unique execution identifier for this governance run.

claim_id.description: Unique identifier for the claim being evaluated.

decision.description: Binary shipping decision. NO soft values, NO maybes, NO partial shipping.

policy_hash.description: SHA256 hash of the policy used for this decision.

key_registry_hash.description: SHA256 hash of the key registry at decision time. Ensures registry-bound verification.

ledger_digest.description: SHA256 of canonicalized ledger (attestations), excluding self-referential ledger_digest field.

blocking_reasons.description: Structured blocking reasons. Empty array iff decision=SHIP. MUST be sorted by (reason_code, obligation_name) for determinism.

satisfied_obligations.description: Obligations that passed quorum-by-class. MUST be sorted lexicographically.

decision_digest.description: SHA256 of canonical decision payload for replay verification. See $defs/decision_digest_payload.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp. EXCLUDED from decision_digest for determinism.

code_version.description: Version of oracle_town code that produced this decision. EXCLUDED from decision_digest.

reason_code.description: Frozen set of reason codes. Adding new codes requires schema version bump.

obligation_name.description: Obligation that triggered this reason (if applicable).

key_id.description: Key ID involved (for KEY_* reason codes).

missing_classes.description: Missing attestor classes for QUORUM_NOT_MET. MUST be sorted lexicographically.

detail.description: Human-readable detail (not used for determinism checks).

decision_digest_payload.description: Canonical payload for decision_digest computation. Fields MUST be in this exact order when serialized.
